sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Mode - Interceptor Car
special_mechanics.description: Primary gameplay involves driving a technologically advanced G-6155 Interceptor sportscar with steering controls and acceleration mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Speedboat Mode
special_mechanics.description: Car can convert to speedboat mode by driving through boathouse. Enemy boats attack from front/behind; helicopter drops bombs from above

special_mechanics.name: Special Weapons System
special_mechanics.description: Limited-use weapons acquired from weapons van: oil slicks, smoke screens, surface-to-air missiles. Oil slick becomes flamethrower in speedboat mode

tier_notes: Tier 3: Game is a vehicular combat title, not a character platformer. No documented jump physics, gravity values, or sub-pixel movement systems. Movement is vehicle-based (car/boat) with acceleration/deceleration via pedal and steering via yoke. Wikipedia source contains only high-level gameplay description with no precise physics parameters.
